items.why_it_matters: An ICE agent fatally shot Mexican national Lorenzo Salgado Araujo during an enforcement operation in Houston on Tuesday. items.title: Australian Network Outage
items.why_it_matters: Telstra experienced a significant national mobile network outage that disrupted data and voice services for millions of customers. The incident resulted in the suspension of regional train operations in Victoria and negatively affected the ability to connect to triple-zero emergency services. Telstra has reported progress in resolving these issues and conducted welfare checks for those impacted by emergency call failures.
